typography_and_base_styles: Switched to a modern system-native font stack (-apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto).
Standardized base font size to 18px and established a consistent color palette (Slate Blue #8998ac, Text #2c3e50, BG #fdfdfd).
navigation_system: Implemented a fully responsive navigation system.
Added a mobile-specific 'hamburger' menu with a smooth dropdown animation (.dropdown-menu).
Cleaned up desktop navigation with uppercase labels, letter spacing, and hover underlines.
Unified navigation includes (_includes/nav-bar-new.html and _includes/nav-bar-new-prof.html) with dropdown classes.
aesthetic_updates: Global Image Styling: All images now have rounded corners (8px), subtle box-shadows, and are automatically center-aligned.
Profile Picture: Updated landing page (index.md) to place a centered, circular profile picture at the top.
Legacy Overrides: Added CSS rules to force-center images that used deprecated HTML 'align' attributes.
PDF Embeds: Optimized layout for CV and Resume pages with high-viewport height embeds.
footer_and_social_icons: Compact Social Icons: Styled .responsiveicon to 24px with a grayscale-to-color transition and hover scaling.
Footer Layout: Centered all footer elements and added a light-gray background for visual separation.
Consistent Gap: Standardized spacing between social links using flexbox.
code_architecture: Unified Layouts: Simplified _layouts/new.html to match the cleaner structure of new_prof.html.
JS Robustness: Added null checks to navigation scripts to prevent errors on pages without menus.
CSS Consolidation: Overhauled css/new.css as the primary design system, removing the need for scattered inline styles.
mathjax_updates: Enabled horizontal scrolling for MathJax equations on mobile devices using a ROBUST JavaScript wrapper approach.
Updated _includes/mathjax.html to automatically wrap all block equations in a <div class='math-scroll-wrapper'>.
Styled .math-scroll-wrapper in css/new.css with a distinct background, border, and scroll behavior.
Enforced right-aligned equation numbering by removing conflicting unconditional MathJax scripts from layouts and relying on _includes/mathjax.html configuration.
Ensured all blog posts have 'mathjax: true' in their front matter to trigger the wrapper script.
Refined Wrapper Script: Used a broader DOM query (including script tag siblings) to reliably find MathJax 2.x elements.
Left-Aligned Equations: Configured MathJax to left-align all display equations with a 2em indent to improve mobile readability.
blog_section_updates: Reformatted the blog menu (Latest, Categories, Archive) to be horizontal on both desktop and mobile.
Removed large inline font-sizes and replaced them with a responsive flexbox-based design in css/new.css.
Added hover effects and consistent uppercase styling to blog navigation links.
Word Cloud: Generated and embedded a responsive word cloud image (/images/blog/wordcloud.png) in ALL blog sections (Latest, Categories, Archive) below the menu.

instructions_for_future_sessions: Read this file to understand the current CSS design system and responsive classes (.dropdown-menu, .profile-pic, .responsiveicon). Always maintain the centered image policy and mobile-first navigation logic. Ensure MathJax is configured via _includes/mathjax.html to keep equation numbers on the right and scrolling working. Use the .blog-menu-list class for blog-related navigation.
